The agent’s execute_python computation (based on var_call_7xhSYW0fOwUcPbEx2cp8Xage) incorrectly concluded that GSPTSE had more up days than down days in 2018 (44 vs 41 in the trace), leading it to include GSPTSE in the final answer when the ground truth indicates only IXIC qualifies.
